name: Canonical URLs
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "About Canonical URLs"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Canonical URLs are like a redirect for search engines when you have the same content with a different URL. A simple example is your home page, which may be found at www.mysite.com.au, but also mysite.com.au or www.mysite.com.au/index.html. All URLs display the same content, but can cause problems when search engines crawl your site. So to improve your SEO, you can set a "}, {"text": "Canonical URL", "bold": true}, {"text": " to tell search engines (like Google) which URL you prefer to display to visitors to your site."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Canonical URLs Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the Canonical URLs add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel, click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the SEO category, find the Canonical URLs add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm installation by clicking the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up window."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The add-on will be installed. Click the "}, {"text": "Close", "bold": true}, {"text": " button when complete."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once active, the "}, {"text": "SEO Canonical URL", "bold": true}, {"text": " field will be added to the "}, {"text": "SEO", "bold": true}, {"text": " section of your product pages."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
